selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 信, 字母, 证书, 字面意义, 铅字, 学问, 出租人；vt. 写字母于, 在...上刻字母, 用字母标明
words.definition: n. a written message addressed to a person or organization

words.translation: n. 苹果, 家伙
words.definition: n. fruit with red or yellow or green skin and sweet to tart crisp whitish flesh

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
words.definition: n. a brief written record

words.translation: a. 古代的, 古老的, 年老的, 旧的
words.definition: s. belonging to times long past especially of the historical period before the fall of the Western Roman Empire

words.translation: n. 形状, 形体, 类型, 方式, 表格, 形式；v. 形成, 排列, (使)组成
words.definition: n. the phonological or orthographic sound or appearance of a word that can be used to describe or identify something

words.translation: a. 最初的, 原始的, 有创意的；n. 原物, 原作
words.definition: s. preceding all others in time or being as first made or performed

words.translation: n. 一种描述, 版本, 译文
words.definition: n. an interpretation of a matter from a particular viewpoint

words.translation: a. 使用过的, 二手的, 习惯的
words.definition: a. employed in accomplishing something

words.translation: n. 馅饼, 财富, 总额, 贪污受贿, 杂乱, 喜鹊
words.definition: n. dish baked in pastry-lined pan often with a pastry top

words.translation: vt. 举例说明, 作图解, 阐明；vi. 举例说明
words.definition: v. depict with an illustration

words.translation: n. 字首, 首字母；a. 开始的, 最初的, 字首的
words.definition: n. the first letter of a word (especially a person's name)

words.translation: a. 有限制的, 有限的, 有限责任的；n. 特别快车
words.definition: a. small in range or scope

words.translation: n. 参考, 索引, 参照；vt. 给...加上参考资料
words.definition: n. the most direct or specific meaning of a word or expression; the class of objects that an expression refers to

words.translation: n. 薄的切片, 一部分, 菜刀；vt. 切成薄片, 切下
words.definition: n. a share of something

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 凯特（女子名, 等于Catherine）
words.definition: n. The brambling finch.

words.translation: n. 伦敦
words.definition: n. the capital and largest city of England; located on the Thames in southeastern England; financial and industrial and cultural center

words.translation: n. 英国
n. 盥洗室, 厕所, 嫖客
words.definition: n. youngest son of Henry II; King of England from 1199 to 1216; succeeded to the throne on the death of his brother Richard I; lost his French possessions; in 1

words.translation: 有限的
n. 约克郡；约克王朝
words.definition: n. the English royal house (a branch of the Plantagenet line) that reigned from 1461 to 1485; its emblem was a white rose
